_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Leadership and guidance involves providing effective leadership and management through team motivation, decision making, risk management, mediation and professional development
reference_document_element_description: Ability to identify and develop data and AI leadership talent within the organization, recognizing potential across diverse backgrounds and building leadership pipelines that strengthen organizational capability.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.439), AB-S-004 (AB, cosine: 0.433).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.372). Shared vocabulary: [leadership]. DDaT-only terms [decision, development, effective, guidance, involves, making] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, ai, backgrounds, building, capability] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.854, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DDaT element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Leadership and guidance involves providing effective leadership and management t" and "Ability to identify and develop data and AI leadership talent within the organiz" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.503 > STS 0.372 (gap +0.131). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [leadership] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.4%. Shared tokens: [leadership]. DDaT-only: [decision, development, effective, guidance, involves, making]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, ai, backgrounds, building, capability].
